originalTitle: Ebola spread in DR Congo 'deeply alarming', MSF warns
title: Ebola spread in DR Congo 'deeply alarming', MSF warns
content: The medical charity's comments come as the head of the World Health Organization visits the region worst-hit by the virus outbreak.

originalTitle: 'Gifts' from a lover and 'botched' cocaine raids: Police inquiry grips South Africa
title: 'Gifts' from a lover and 'botched' cocaine raids: Police inquiry grips South Africa
content: South Africa's Madlanga Commission hears about Brazilian butt lift bribe denials and alleged drug heists.

title: Ghana's parliament passes anti-LGBTQ+ bill
content: Same-sex acts are punishable by jail terms under Ghana's new bill targeting those identifying as gay, lesbian or transgender.

originalTitle: US Congress advances American-Israeli military integration plan
title: US Congress advances American-Israeli military integration plan
content: A provision in the 2027 draft US defence bill could bind the two countries' weapons industries closer than ever.

originalTitle: Al Jazeera exclusive interview with rebel FARC faction in Colombia
title: Al Jazeera exclusive interview with rebel FARC faction in Colombia
content: In Colombia, FARC dissidents say they returned to war after a historic peace deal failed to deliver security

title: Lebanese army ‘overly stretched’ to fight off latest Israeli invasion
content: Geopolitical analyst Joe Macaron says the Lebanese army is ‘overly stretched’ as Israeli troops expand their occupation.

originalTitle: US, UK and Australia to develop underwater drone technology
title: US, UK and Australia to develop underwater drone technology
content: The technology, developed under the Aukus military pact, is aimed at protecting undersea cables and boosting naval defence.

originalTitle: No deal announced after Trump meeting to make 'final determination' on Iran
title: No deal announced after Trump meeting to make 'final determination' on Iran
content: The US president met his advisers, after officials confirmed the US and Iran had agreed a framework of a deal.

originalTitle: Italy bans Kanye West and Travis Scott concerts over security concerns
title: Italy bans Kanye West and Travis Scott concerts over security concerns
content: Local authorities say the cancellation of other West concerts had played a role in the decision.

originalTitle: Why crucial penalty miss was 'cruel blow' for Arsenal standout Gabriel
title: Why crucial penalty miss was 'cruel blow' for Arsenal standout Gabriel
content: Gabriel's first penalty for Arsenal ends in heartache as his shootout miss hands Paris St-Germain a second successive Champions League title.

originalTitle: PSG go back-to-back and join 'greatest of all time'
title: PSG go back-to-back and join 'greatest of all time'
content: Paris St-Germain underline their status as one of European football's greatest ever teams by retaining their Champions League crown with victory against Arsenal.

originalTitle: Arsenal 'pain' will fuel fire after Champions League heartbreak
title: Arsenal 'pain' will fuel fire after Champions League heartbreak
content: On Sunday, Arsenal will get on an open bus parade to celebrate their Premier League title less than 24 hours after their Champions League final heartbreak.
